courseDetails.title: Beginner to Pro: How to Develop for Apple Watch - 10+ Apps!
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn how to make Apple Watch apps from scratch. No prior experience needed. Become an expert Apple Watch Developer.
courseDetails.longDescription:
This course will teach you everything about the Apple Watch right from the very basic to the more complex concepts you will require to build an app from scratch.

This course is taught in Objective-C and will be updated on a regular basis with new app lessons. The lectures also include detailed descriptions which have links to the various resources (such as icons and pictures) being used in the lectures so that you have access to all the resources to start making your own app.

The lectures are 5-12 minutes long. If you spend even 15min/day on this course, it will only take you 2-3 weeks to get a good hold of the subject before you can start experimenting with apps on your own.

The course is structured so that we go from the very basics of Apple Watch Development to the more complex topics which involve working with the iPhone and Apple Watch both.

This course is for everyone who wants to learn how to develop for the Apple Watch, learn Objective-C and wants to start developing for iOS in general.
targetAudiences: This course is meant for people who are new to iOS and Apple Watch Development
No prior programming experience needed so anyone can take this course
Course is taught in Objective-C, so people who are interested in Objective-C should join

courseDetails.title: Free Google Maps API Course for Beginners
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn Google Maps API basics for web developers – free beginner course with markers, shapes & events.
courseDetails.longDescription:
[UPDATE - Feb 2026] Subtitles available: Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), Japanese, Chinese

Unlock the power of Google Maps API and bring interactive maps to your web projects! This free beginner course is designed for developers, hobbyists, and students who want to learn how to integrate Google Maps into websites and applications. You’ll start from the basics and gradually explore key features like markers, shapes, events, and advanced enhancements.


What you’ll learn:

  • How to set up Google Maps in your projects and configure basic controls.

  • How to add and customize markers, InfoWindows, and advanced marker animations.

  • How to draw and style shapes like circles, polygons, polylines, and rectangles.

  • How to handle map events and user interactions, including clicks, zoom changes, and boundary shifts.

  • How to manage multiple markers efficiently with clustering techniques.

  • Learn comfortably with professionally prepared multilingual subtitles (ES, PT-BR, JA, ZH)

Course Modules:

Module 1 – Map Basics
Learn how to initialize a Google Map, configure zoom and pan controls, and add your first marker with an InfoWindow.

Module 2 – Drawing Shapes
Draw circles, polygons, polylines, and rectangles, and learn how to customize their appearance to highlight areas or paths.

Module 3 – Map Events & Interactions
Make your maps interactive by responding to user actions like clicks, zoom changes, and bounds changes.

Module 4 – Advanced Markers & Clustering
Customize markers with icons and animations, and use clustering to manage multiple markers efficiently.

Module 5 – Full Course Preview
Get a sneak peek of advanced features such as autocomplete, directions, and routing, and see how the full course can take your skills to the next level.


Who this course is for:

  • Beginners and web developers who want to learn Google Maps API from scratch.

  • Students and hobbyists interested in interactive maps and location-based applications.

  • Anyone wanting a practical, hands-on introduction to map visualization and interactivity.

Requirements:

  • Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

  • A Google account to access the Google Maps API key (free).

  • No prior experience with Google Maps API is needed.

Start building interactive maps today with this free, beginner-friendly Google Maps API course and take the first step toward mastering location-based web applications!
targetAudiences: Beginner developers who want to start integrating Google Maps into their web projects.
Students and hobbyists curious about interactive maps and location-based applications.
Web developers looking to explore the Google Maps API before enrolling in the full advanced course.
Anyone interested in learning map visualization and basic interactivity in a practical, hands-on way.

courseDetails.title: From Data to Insights in Qualitative Research using Nvivo 15
courseDetails.shortDescription: master the art of qualitative analysis
courseDetails.longDescription:
In today’s data-driven world, understanding why people think, behave, and decide the way they do is more important than ever. Numbers alone can’t tell the full story — and that’s where qualitative research comes in.

This course is designed to help researchers, students, and professionals confidently move from raw, unstructured data — such as interview transcripts, focus group discussions, open-ended surveys, or textual documents — to clear, evidence-based insights.

You’ll not only learn the art and science of qualitative data analysis (QDA), but also gain hands-on mastery of NVivo 15, one of the world’s most trusted tools for qualitative research. NVivo streamlines the entire process — from organizing messy data to identifying themes, visualizing patterns, and generating reports — allowing you to focus on what really matters: interpreting meaning.

Through a blend of conceptual explanations, real-world examples, and guided demonstrations, this course will show you how to Understand and apply key qualitative research methodologies, Perform manual and automated coding, develop categories, and build hierarchical themes, and Explore data using queries, word frequency analysis, and matrix coding to uncover relationships.

Whether you are a Ph.D. scholar conducting interviews, a market researcher analyzing customer feedback, or a policy analyst evaluating social data, this course will equip you with the skills and confidence to turn qualitative data into meaningful insights.
targetAudiences: PhD and Master’s students conducting qualitative research.
Social scientists, education researchers, and healthcare professionals.
Market researchers and policy analysts working with qualitative data.
Anyone who wants to analyze interviews, focus groups, or open-ended survey responses.

courseDetails.title: Basics of Scalping in Forex, Crypto and Stocks for Beginners
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn Step-by-Step Scalping Strategies for Fast, Consistent Profits Using EMA, VWAP, Bollinger Bands, and Price Action
courseDetails.longDescription:
What this course is

This is a practical, outcome-focused trading course that teaches short-duration market strategies (scalping) using price action, volatility measures, volume, and trend filters. It is a step-by-step training program for traders who want to capture many small, high-probability moves each trading day. It is not a get-rich-quick promise, not a set of secret indicators, and not an academic lecture. It is a trade-engineering program: build, test, practice, and refine.

This trading course is explicitly optimized for people who trade forex trading instruments, crypto trading pairs, or liquid index/stock instruments. Strategies and risk templates are mapped to the unique characteristics of each market.

Key outcomes — what you will be able to do after completing this trading course

  • Confidently identify high-probability scalping setups on lower timeframes (M1, M5) for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Apply a consistent checklist for entries based on confluence between EMAs, VWAP, volume, and momentum indicators.

  • Use volatility-based methods (ATR and Bollinger Bands) to size stops, place targets, and decide when not to trade.

  • Read volume and tick activity to detect institutional participation and avoid false breakouts.

  • Implement dynamic trailing stops and management rules that protect gains while allowing winners to run.

  • Design and backtest a personalized scalping plan and a risk-control framework suitable for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Maintain professional trade logs, performance metrics, and iterative improvement processes.

Who this trading course is for


  • New traders who want a structured path into short-term trading and practical skills for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Active day traders who want to add proven scalping strategies to their toolkit.

  • Part-time traders who need high-probability, fast-execution setups that fit limited screen time.

  • Technical traders who prefer rule-based systems over discretionary guessing.

  • Traders who already use MT4, MT5, or TradingView and want to convert indicators into a reliable routine.

This course is not aimed at long-term investors looking for portfolio allocation strategies, nor at people seeking speculative tips without risk management.

Detailed syllabus — module by module

Module 0 — Orientation and setup

  • Course objectives, expected outcomes, and weekly practice schedule.

  • How to set up MT4/MT5 and TradingView workspaces for scalping. Templates provided.

  • Broker selection criteria for scalping: spreads, execution, slippage, and order types (ECN vs STP).

  • Demo account setup and safety checklist.

Module 1 — Foundations: Market structure and micro timeframes

  • Understanding tick behavior, liquidity, and market microstructure.

  • The difference in behavior between forex trading pairs, crypto trading pairs, and equities.

  • How to read one-minute and five-minute structures without overfitting.

Module 2 — Essential indicators and how to use them (practical rules)

  • EMA 9, EMA 20, EMA 200: exact use cases, entry filters, and conflict rules.

  • VWAP: constructing intraday bias and trade timing around the value area.

  • RSI and Stochastic: momentum confirmation rules and false-signal mitigation.

  • Bollinger Bands and ATR: volatility assessment and stop-placement formulas.

  • Volume and tick charts: interpreting spikes, divergence, and institutional signatures.

Module 3 — Price action and candlestick reading on lower timeframes

  • Single-candle and multi-candle patterns that matter for scalping: hammer, engulfing, doji, marubozu.

  • Quick methods to validate a pattern using multi-timeframe checks.

  • Combining price action with indicator confluence for immediate trade decisions.

Module 4 — Support & resistance, zones, and psychological levels

  • How to mark high-probability zones in 60 seconds and why zones work better than exact lines.

  • Round-number psychology and session highs/lows as trade frames.

  • Fast-entry templates: bounce, retest, and breakout rules.

Module 5 — Breakout vs pullback trading (scalping variants)

  • Objective rules for breakout entries: confirmation candle, volume threshold, and stop placement.

  • Pullback entry templates: ideal retracement sizes, acceptable risk windows, and trade management.

  • Statistical performance expectations and when to prefer one method over the other.

Module 6 — Volatility and stop management (ATR-driven rules)

  • Compute ATR-based stop distances and convert to position sizing.

  • How to set realistic TP targets for scalping: fixed pip, ATR-multiple, or momentum-based exits.

  • Trailing stop algorithms that protect winners without premature exits.

Module 7 — Volume analysis and tick charts for superior timing

  • Practical volume cues that predict continuation versus exhaustion.

  • Tick chart application: when to switch from time-based to tick-based charts.

  • Examples of institutional footprints and how to follow them on forex trading vs crypto trading instruments.

Module 8 — Risk control, position sizing, and money management

  • Concrete spreadsheets and calculators for position sizing tied to account risk.

  • Session-level risk controls and daily loss limits.

  • Correlation controls: avoiding simultaneous exposure across correlated forex trading pairs.

Module 9 — Psychology, routines, and trade discipline

  • Pre-session checklists, trade entry scripts, and rules for automated discipline.

  • Post-trade review processes and how to interpret performance metrics.

  • Handling streaks: actionable procedures for both winning and losing runs.

Module 10 — Strategy construction, testing, and live drills

  • Build a personal scalping system using provided blueprints.

  • Backtest procedures and realistic forward-testing on demo accounts.

  • Live-procedure drills: how to run a 60-minute practice session that yields learning, not noise.


Teaching method and learning workflow

  • Lecture → Immediate practice: every core lesson ends with a short exercise you complete on a demo chart.

  • Checklists and decision trees: each strategy comes with a one-page checklist you can use in real time.

  • Backtest kit: downloadable spreadsheets and TradingView watchlists for controlled testing.

  • Live annotated charts and trade replay: see the setups applied in actual market conditions.

  • Assessment: practice assignments, strategy submission, and feedback templates for self-review.

Prerequisites and technical requirements

  • Basic familiarity with trading platform navigation (placing orders, reading charts). If you do not have this, a short primer module is included.

  • A PC or laptop with stable internet and access to TradingView or MT4/MT5.

  • A free demo trading account (recommended for the entire course practice period).

  • No coding knowledge is required.

Why this trading course is different

  • Every rule is actionable and quantifiable. No vague advice.

  • Market-specific templates: forex trading and crypto trading differences are explicitly taught and applied.

  • Emphasis on repeatability: you will leave with a checklist-driven system you can run in real time.

  • Balanced focus: technical tools, volatility control, and human performance (psychology and routines).

Common objections and answers

  • “Is scalping too risky?” Scalping concentrates risk into many small, controlled exposures with strict stop logic. This course teaches risk-first procedures so risk per trade is defined and small.

  • “Will this work for crypto trading?” Yes. Crypto-specific volatility and exchange considerations are covered with adapted sizing and execution rules.

  • “Do I need an expensive broker?” No. You need a broker or exchange with low, consistent spreads and reliable execution; recommendations and screening checklists are provided.
targetAudiences: Beginners who want to start trading but prefer fast results and short trades instead of long-term investing.
Day Traders & Swing Traders who want to add scalping techniques to their trading arsenal for extra opportunities.
Intermediate Traders looking to refine their entry/exit timing using professional tools like VWAP, EMA, RSI, and ATR.
Technical Analysis Learners who want to practice chart reading and momentum confirmation on lower timeframes (M1–M5).

courseDetails.title: Learn Angular 20: Build Counter Application
courseDetails.shortDescription: Master the Angular basics with a project-driven approach
courseDetails.longDescription:
Ready to dive into Angular with a hands-on project that actually makes sense? This course is your practical gateway into the world of modern web development using the Angular framework. Whether you're just starting out or brushing up on the latest version, you'll build a fully functional counter application from scratch - learning by doing every step of the way.

Through this guided project, you'll explore core Angular concepts like components, data binding, event handling, and conditional rendering—all while crafting a sleek, interactive UI. No fluff, no filler - just real code, real results. You'll also get familiar with Angular CLI, TypeScript syntax, and best practices for structuring scalable applications.

As you progress, you’ll develop a clear understanding of Angular’s fundamentals and gain practical experience building and styling a responsive counter app. Along the way, you’ll grow more confident working with TypeScript and the Angular CLI, while establishing a solid foundation that will prepare you to take on more advanced projects with ease.

This course is perfect for beginners, hobbyists, or anyone curious about Angular’s power. Whether you are aiming to build your first app or strengthen your front-end skills, this project-based approach will help you learn faster and retain more. Start coding today and bring your ideas to life with the Angular framework.
targetAudiences: Web developers who want a practical introduction to Angular 20 through a practical project.
Anyone curious about modern JavaScript frameworks and ready to start building with Angular.

courseDetails.title: Machine Learning Project - Electricity Demand Forecasting
courseDetails.shortDescription: Build an Electricity Demand Prediction Machine Learning Model in Python (End-to-End Tutorial)
courseDetails.longDescription:
In this project, you will learn how to build a Machine Learning model with Python. We will build a XGBoost Model that will help us in forecasting of electricity demand in a city.

You will learn how to handle time-series data, create powerful features, train a machine learning model and and evaluate its performance.

Here, we have used a historical data of last 5 years. Based on this data we will predict the future demand using our model.

This is a time series dataset with Per Hour information. In this dataset, we have multiple useful columns like - Temperature, Humidity, Demand etc.

From the datetime column, we created other useful columns like day_of_year, week_of_year, is_weekend, is_holiday etc.

We have used the line chart, box plot for visualization.


Key Learnings:

  • Time Series Data Handling

  • Feature Engineering for Demand Forecasting

  • Machine Learning (XGBoost) for Prediction

  • Model Evaluation (RMSE, MAE)

  • Understanding Energy Consumption Patterns


We will make use of :

  • Python: The core programming language

  • Pandas: Data manipulation and analysis

  • NumPy: Numerical operations

  • Matplotlib & Seaborn: Data visualization

  • Scikit-learn: Machine learning utilities

  • XGBoost: Gradient Boosting for robust predictions

  • Holidays: For national holiday data

Master Energy Forecasting: A Python Project for Electricity Demand Prediction.


Thanks all students !
targetAudiences: Anyone wants to learn Machine Learning with Python

courseDetails.title: How to Build +10K Passive Income by Reselling SMM Panels
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn how to build, manage, and scale a profitable SMM panel business from reseller to provider with automation
courseDetails.longDescription:
Are you ready to dive into the fast-growing world of Social Media Marketing (SMM) panels and build a real online business that generates consistent income? This course is designed to guide you step-by-step through everything you need to know to start, operate, and scale your own profitable SMM panel — whether you want to be a reseller or a full-fledged service provider.

SMM panels are platforms where social media marketing services — like Instagram followers, YouTube views, TikTok likes, and more — are bought and sold, often automatically via API integration. But the truth is, while many people know what an SMM panel is, few understand the real business behind it and how to run one successfully.

In this course, I’ll break down the entire ecosystem so you can fully grasp the difference between being a reseller and being a provider, and which path suits you best. I’ll show you how to set up your panel using stable, proven providers and automation tools that deliver thousands of orders with minimal manual work.

You will learn how to automate order processing, manage multiple social media accounts safely, and avoid common pitfalls like service bans or delivery failures. We’ll explore the technical side in a way that’s easy to understand — no confusing jargon, just clear steps.

One of the biggest challenges in the SMM panel business is finding and retaining customers. This course will teach you how to attract clients through smart marketing, niche targeting, and building a trustworthy brand — because, without clients, your panel won’t survive. I’ll share insider tips on how top resellers position themselves, price their services with healthy margins, and use simple automation to maximize profits.

If you want to become a provider, I’ll walk you through what it really takes — from managing bulk social media accounts to running custom bots and scripts for delivery. It’s not a passive business; it requires dedication and smart systems, but the rewards are huge if done right.

By the end of this course, you’ll have a full understanding of the SMM panel market, know exactly how to launch your own panel or reseller business, and have a clear plan to scale it into a sustainable source of income that could easily grow into $10K/month or more.

Whether you’re a complete beginner looking for a new online business opportunity, a freelancer wanting to diversify your income, or a marketer ready to explore the booming social media service industry, this course will equip you with practical, actionable knowledge — not just theory.

Join me, and start building your SMM panel business with confidence. You don’t have to reinvent the wheel; just learn the proven methods, avoid the common mistakes, and create your own profitable system that works.
targetAudiences: Aspiring entrepreneurs interested in social media marketing services.
Anyone wanting to start or grow an SMM panel or reseller business.
Freelancers and digital marketers looking to diversify income streams.
People ready to build automated, scalable online businesses.

courseDetails.title: دورة الأفتر إفكت الأساسية Adobe After Effects Course Part 4
courseDetails.shortDescription: تعلم أساسيات برنامج الأفتر إفكت لعمل أي شيئ يتعلق بالموشن جرافيك و التحريك، المؤثرات البصرية
courseDetails.longDescription:
أهلا بك في الدورة الشاملة عن الأفتر إفكت التي سنتطرق فيها إلى كل التفاصيل المتعلقة بهذا البرنامج الهائل ففي هذه الدورة لن تخرج منها إلا و أنت تعرف كل تفاصيل و أسرار برنامج ادوبي افتر افكت


قبل أن تشاهد هذا الجزء أدعوك و بشدة لمشاهدة الجزء الأول و الثاني و الثالث لشرح برنامج الأفتر إفكت و هو منشور على حسابي في يودمي حتى تستطيع أن تحصل على أقصى إستفادة من هذه الدورة، في هذه الدورة سوف أشرح لك كل التأثيرات التي يتيحها برنامج الأفتر إفكت و أشرح لك عناصرها و تفاصيلها الدقيقة حتى تصبح قادر على العمل على تأثيرات الأفتر إفكت بفعالية عالية


أسعى جاهدا على تطوير و توسيع هذه الدورة و جعلها كاملة دوما بحيث أني سأشرح كل التحديثات التي ستكون موجودة على البرنامج حتى لا أترك لديك أي لبس أو سوء فهم، أيضا يجب أن تعلم أني قد تطرقت لكل التفاصيل الخاص بالبرنامج كما لم يشرحها أي مدرس أخر يتكلم عن الأفتر إفكت لذا تأكد أن تأخذ هذه الدورة بمحمل الجد و تركز مع كل حرف أقوله لك


هذه الدورة ليست شروحات عادية لأعمال فنية على برنامج الأدوبي أفتر إفكت و إنما سأشرح لك أساسيات عمل البرنامج حتى تستطيع أن تفهم مبدأ عمل الافتر افكت لتصبح قادر على تصميم أي عمل من الصفر بدون الحاجة إلى أي معلم أو من يرشدك لطريقة العمل فانا لا أريد إعطائك السمك و إنما أريد تعليمك صيد السمك بنفسك


إذا كنت تريد أن تتعلم برنامج ادوبي افتر افكت بالشكل الصحيح و على الأساس العلمية الصحيحة فأنت في المكان الصحيح من أجل ان تتعلم كل ما يتعلق ببرنماج الافتر افكت فكل من شاهدة دروسي التعليمية من قبل كان جد سعيد بها خاصة و أني أشرح لك كل شيء من الصفر و أعتبرك لا تعرف اي شيء عن البرنامج و ليس لديك معلومات و خبرات مسبقة


فيما يلي بعض النقاط التي سنتطرق إليها في الدورة الأساسية الخاصة بالافتر افكت:

  1. شرح شريط المهام بالتفصيل الممل و كل ما تستطيع القيام به من هنا

  2. شرح شريط الأدوات و تخصيص حلقة لكل آداة من أجل تفصيل خباياها

  3. أنواع الطبقات و الفروقات الموجودة بينها على برنامج الافتر افكت

  4. التكلم عن الحركة في الأفتر إفكت و كيف أستخدم الكي فريم بفعالية عالية

  5. الكشف عن كل تقنيات التعامل مع برنامج أدوبي افتر افكت

  6. التعامل مع الكاميرا تلاثية الأبعاد على برنامج الافتر افكت

  7. درس تطبيقي يشرح طريقة صناعة إنترو إحترافي من الصفر

  8. درس تطبيقي يشرح طريقة صناعة أوترو على الأفتر إفكت خطوة بخطوة

  9. إعدادات التصدير المثالية لأحصل على أحسن جودة و أقل حجم ممكن

  10. إنشاء موشن جرافيك إحترافي خطوة بخطوة

  11. المشاركة في العديد من الأعمال و المهام التطبيقية للتأكد من أن مستواك يتحسن على افتر افكت

  12. ملاحظة: الدورة لا تزال تحت التطوير لذا يمكن أن تجد عناصر لم أتطرق لها بعد


أنا لرقم فارس أعمل على برنامج أدوبي افتر افكت من أكثر من خمس سنوات لي العديد من الشروحات الإحترافية المتعلقة ببرنامج الأفتر إفكت في منصات تعليمية أخرى، كما قمت بإنجاز الكثير من مشاريع الموشن جرافيك وعمل المقدمات الإحترافية و الخواتيم، بحيث سأقدم لك كل الخبرة التي جمعتها على مدار السنوات الماضية في أحسن صورة و أفضل هيئة لتكون قادر على العمل على برنامج الافتر افكت بفعالية عالية


أعدك أنك ستحصل على قيمة فريدة من نوعها و محتوى حصري غير موجود في العالم العربي
targetAudiences: لكل مصمم يريد تعلم برنامج الأفتر إفكت على أساس قاعدة علمية صحيحة
لكل من يعمل على برنامج الأفتر إفكت و يريد تطوير مستوى آدائه على البرنامج
لكل مستقل يريد دخول عالم العمل في تصميم فيديوهات الموشن جرافيك
مناسب لكل منشىء محتوى من أجل القدرة على تصميم محتوى جذاب
لكل صانع أفلام يريد أن يبدأ في إضافة المؤثرات البصرية على أفلامه

courseDetails.title: Migrate on-prem Oracle 12c Database to AWS RDS 19c instance
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn step-by-step how to migrate Oracle 12c to AWS RDS 19c using Data Pump export/import
courseDetails.longDescription:
Are you looking to migrate your on-premise Oracle 12c database to the cloud using Amazon RDS 19c? This hands-on course provides a complete, step-by-step guide to successfully perform the migration process using Oracle Data Pump expdp/impdp

Whether you're a Database Administrator (DBA), Cloud Engineer, or IT professional exploring AWS, this course walks you through the practical details and best practices of cloud migration using real-world scenarios.

We’ll cover everything from setting up your AWS RDS instance to exporting and importing data, handling schema-level migration, and validating post-migration integrity.

No prior AWS experience is required, but a basic understanding of Oracle databases and Linux command line is recommended. By the end of the course, you'll be able to confidently migrate Oracle databases to AWS RDS using data pump for future migrations.

What You Will Learn

  • Key differences between Oracle 12c (on-prem) and Oracle 19c in AWS RDS

  • Setting up AWS RDS for Oracle 19c

  • Preparing Oracle 12c for migration

  • Exporting data using Oracle Data Pump (expdp)

  • Importing data into AWS RDS 19c (impdp)

  • Perform an AWS RDS setup and configure the target Oracle 19c instance.

  • Handling pre- and post-migration validation

  • Monitoring, troubleshooting, and performance tuning

  • Creating a par file from the Data export

  • Crating a par file for the data pump import
targetAudiences: Students who want to learn how to migrate Oracle database into AWS RDS
Students who want to learn how to upload and down objects from s3 bucket
Students who want to learn how AWS Roles and Poplices work

courseDetails.title: Unity Basic Course in Hindi for Beginners Part 1
courseDetails.shortDescription: Game Development Using Unity, Especially Designed for Beginners(adults), including Fundamentals of Unity Editor.
courseDetails.longDescription:
Unity Basic Course in Hindi for Beginners Part 1

Are you excited to learn game development but don’t know where to start? The course is delivered in Hindi, making it easier for native speakers to understand the concepts clearly. This free Unity Basic Course in Hindi for Beginners Part 1 is designed just for you! Whether you're a school student, college student, or simply someone passionate about games, this course will help you take your first step into the world of game development using Unity — one of the most powerful and popular game engines in the world.

In this course, you will learn the Unity interface, understand the basic tools, and start creating simple interactive content. You'll also learn the basics of the game mechanics, and how to start building your first game. All the lessons are explained clearly in Hindi, making it easy to understand even if you’re completely new to programming or game design.

This course contains Unity's fundamentals that you should learn before starting game development.

Last Lectures contains some C# programming. Students should never hesitate to learn it as Programming is an important part of  Game development skill.

Don’t miss this opportunity to begin your game development journey. Enroll now and start creating your own games today!
targetAudiences: Anyone who is interested in Game Development using Unity.

courseDetails.title: The Optimum Introduction to Ethical Hacking
courseDetails.shortDescription: Master the Concepts of Ethical Hacking and Cybersecurity Essentials.
courseDetails.longDescription:
Welcome to The Optimum Introduction to Ethical Hacking


<<This course covers the foundational principles of ethical hacking to help you start your journey with confidence.>>


Step into the exciting and ever-evolving world of ethical hacking and cybersecurity with this elite and thoughtfully designed course. Its purpose is to guide you toward mastering the essential fundamentals of this dynamic and highly critical field. In today’s fast-paced digital era, cyber threats and data breaches are constantly increasing, making the need for skilled ethical hackers more vital than ever. This comprehensive and beginner-friendly course provides an engaging learning experience, offering you a clear understanding of fundamental ethical hacking concepts. You will learn about the motivations behind hacking, the types of hackers, cyber-attacks, malware, the deep web, and much more—all of which are explained in a detailed, yet easily digestible, format to ensure clarity and comprehension.


At XEye Academy, we take immense pride in presenting this top-tier course led by Mostafa Ahmad, a highly esteemed cybersecurity professional with over 12 years of proven expertise in ethical hacking and a successful track record in the field. His vast knowledge and strong commitment to excellence simplify complex topics, making them enjoyable and accessible, especially for those who are new to ethical hacking. Whether you’re looking to build a career in cybersecurity or aiming to grasp the essential principles of this critical domain, this course is crafted to fit your goals perfectly.


This course is not only packed with valuable knowledge and insights but is also designed to ensure a rewarding and enriching learning experience. Its content is structured to help you build confidence and motivation as you explore the fascinating field of ethical hacking. Throughout your journey, our dedicated team is here to address any questions, provide guidance, and support you at every step of the way. We strive to make the learning process enjoyable and fulfilling, creating an environment where you feel empowered to succeed and grow.


So, don’t wait! Enroll now and embark on your ethical hacking journey with XEye Academy. Whether you’re a curious beginner or someone with a growing passion for cybersecurity, this course is your gateway to a world of valuable knowledge and exceptional opportunities.


Start today and become part of the future of cybersecurity!

courseDetails.title: أفضل أنواع الدخل السلبي الطباعة عند الطلب Print on Demand
courseDetails.shortDescription: كيفية الربح من مارش باي أمازون و تحويل أفكارك إلى أرباح في مجال الطباعة عند الطلب من دون أي تدخل منك
courseDetails.longDescription:
الربح من الطباعة حسب الطلب ( Print On Demand ) يعتبر من أسهل طرق الربح من الإنترنت والتي تحتاج لرأس مال قليل جداً يكاد يقترب من الصفر.
لن أضيع وقتك بالكثير بالمقدمات الطويلة فهذا الدليل مليئ بالمعلومات، لأنك ستتعرف فيه على الكثير من المعلومات التي لن تجدها في أماكن أخرى.

لأنك في هذا الدليل ستجد كل ما تحتاجه لتبدا خطوة بخطوة في هذا المجال:

  • كيف يعمل مجال الطباعة عند الطلب ( Print On Demand )

  • كيف تختار النيتش المربحة  التي يمكن أن تضاعف أرباحك

  • كيف تبحث عن أفضل التصميمات في أي نيتش

  • كيف تبدأ على منصة Redbubble

  • أفضل أداة التي تجعلك تتفوق على المنافسين وتحقق أرباح ممتازة

  • كيف تقوم بالتسويق لتصميماتك على السوشيال ميديا بذكاء

في هذا الكورس سوف تتعرف على الخطوط العريضة التي تسمح لك العمل في مجال مارش باي امازون هذا إذا كنت تملك حساب ميرش باي أمازون و لكنك لم تعرف كيف يعمل نظام مارش باي امازون، لكن حتى إذا كنت لا تملك حساب merch by amazon يمكننا أن نوفر لك حساب


أيضا سوف نتكلم عن فلسفة العمل في مجال الطباعة عند الطلب و كيف يعمل نظام Print on demand


من هو مقدم الدورة:

أنا لرقم فارس مسوق محترف يعمل في مجال الطباعة عند الطلب منذ أكثر من خمس سنوات حققت آلاف المبيعات على كل من مارش باي أمازون و العديد من مواقع الطباعة عند الطلب الأخرى على غرار إيتسي و ردبيبل و زازل و غيرها من المواقع الأخرى المختصة في مجال بيع المنتجات بشكل طباعة بعد الطلب


الطباعة عند طلب هو واحد من أفضل المجالات التي يفضلها العملاء عند الشراء أونلاين، لأنهم يشعرون أنهم يشترون شيئاً فريداً من نوعه ولا يملكه الكثير من الناس.


ما الذي ستستفيده من هذه الدورة:

  1. فهم مبدأ عمل الطباعة عند الطلب

  2. كيف أفتح متجر على أحد مواقع الطباعة عند الطلب بشكل مجاني

  3. التعرف على مدى توافق المجال معك

  4. لماذا أحب مجال الطباعة عند الطلب من بين كل مجالات العمل الأخرى على الأنترنت

  5. كيف أستلم أرباح العمل في مجال الطباعة عند الطلب

  6. كيف أجد فكرة في مارش باي امازون و أعيد تصميمها لتحقق لي آلاف الدولارات

  7. آساليب البيع المختلفة على الأنترنت

  8. عرض خاص ستتعرف عليه بعد أن تنهي هذه الدورة

لم يبقى لي إلى أن أنتظرك داخل الدورة ماذا تنتظر لتبدأ في دراسة الدورة خاصة و أن الدورة مجانية هذه الفترة


  • ملاحظة:

الدورة لن تبقى مجانية مدى الحياة و ستعود لسعرها الأصلي

بالتوفيق لك
targetAudiences: هذه الدورة مفيدة لكل من يريد ان يبدأ رحلة الربح من الأنترنت بأقل مصاريف

courseDetails.title: Grow and Sell How to Grow & Flip YouTube Channels for Profit
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn how to build, monetize, and sell YouTube channels using shorts and live streams – no experience required.
courseDetails.longDescription:
Do you want to turn YouTube into a money-making machine? In this step-by-step course, you’ll learn how to grow, monetize, and flip YouTube channels for profit – even if you're starting from zero.

Whether you're a beginner or someone looking to build a new income stream, this course will guide you through the complete process of building valuable YouTube channels using live streams and shorts, and then selling them for 30K to 100K+ depending on their performance and audience reach.

You’ll learn the exact methods that smart digital entrepreneurs are using right now to generate passive income — by growing faceless, automated channels and flipping them for real cash. The best part? You don’t need to be on camera, no expensive gear is required, and no previous YouTube experience is needed.

This course breaks everything down into clear, actionable steps – from setting up your channel the right way, to using content strategies that drive fast growth, to monetizing and flipping your channels on the right platforms. You'll also get insider tips, tools, and real examples that make the entire process easier and faster.

Whether you’re a student, freelancer, job seeker, or side hustler, this is a high-demand skill you can learn once and repeat over and over to build a profitable digital asset.

By the end of this course, you’ll be fully equipped to grow YouTube channels from scratch and flip them for profit – without ever showing your face or investing a lot of money.

Enroll now and start building your YouTube flipping business today! This could be the smartest move you make this year.
targetAudiences: Beginners who want to make money from YouTube
Students and Job Seekers looking for a side income
Content Creators who want to grow fast
Freelancers and Digital Marketers
Anyone looking to build a passive income stream

courseDetails.title: Turn Your Idea Into a Web Application – No-Code – in Arabic
courseDetails.shortDescription: تعلم كيفية إنشاء وتخصيص وتسييل تطبيق ويب بدون برمجة باستخدام Hostinger Horizons.
courseDetails.longDescription:
إنشاء تطبيق ويب في وقت قياسي – بدون كود

هل ترغب في تطوير تطبيق ويب دون الحاجة إلى مهارات برمجية؟ هذا الدورة مصممة خصيصًا لك. باستخدام Hostinger Horizons، ستتعلم كيفية إنشاء وتخصيص وتسييل تطبيق SaaS الخاص بك دون كتابة أي سطر من الكود.

خلال الدورة، ستكتشف الخطوات الأساسية لتحويل فكرتك إلى مشروع ملموس. ستتعلم كيفية كتابة التوجيهات الفعالة، وإصلاح الأخطاء الشائعة، وإضافة ميزات جديدة، وتصميم واجهة مستخدم محسّنة. وأخيرًا، ستتعرف على كيفية اختبار تطبيقك وتسييله ليصبح مشروعًا مربحًا.

ما الذي ستتعلمه؟

  • فهم وإتقان أساسيات الـ No-Code

  • التنقل بكفاءة في Hostinger Horizons

  • كتابة توجيهات فعالة لإنشاء تطبيق ويب

  • إصلاح الأخطاء بسهولة وتحسين المشروع

  • إضافة ميزات متقدمة وتخصيص تجربة المستخدم

  • تصميم صفحة مساعدة احترافية

  • اختبار التطبيق قبل الإطلاق

  • تطبيق استراتيجيات التسييل

تم تصميم هذه الدورة لتكون عملية وسهلة الفهم، مما يسمح لك بتطبيق المفاهيم خطوة بخطوة. لا حاجة لأي معرفة برمجية سابقة، فكل الأدوات والموارد اللازمة متاحة لك. سواء كنت رائد أعمال، مستقلًا، أو شخصًا يبحث عن تحويل فكرته إلى تطبيق ناجح، فهذه الدورة هي بوابتك إلى النجاح.

ملاحظات:

ستتضمن الدورة مزيجًا من الدروس النظرية والتطبيقية، الأمثلة العملية، وورش العمل، مما يساعد المشاركين على تطبيق المفاهيم المكتسبة. سيتم استخدام تمارين، دراسات حالة، ومحاكاة واقعية لتعزيز الفهم.

موارد تعليمية إضافية:

  • ورشة عمل عبر الإنترنت

د. فراس
targetAudiences: رواد الأعمال الذين يرغبون في إنشاء وإطلاق SaaS بسرعة.
المستقلون الذين يسعون إلى توسيع خدماتهم باستخدام حلول No-Code.
صناع المحتوى الذين يريدون تطوير أدوات مخصصة لجمهورهم.
المبتدئون الذين ليس لديهم خبرة تقنية ويريدون تعلم تطوير No-Code.

courseDetails.title: Free HTML & CSS for Beginners
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn HTML & CSS Fundamentals In 2 Hours
courseDetails.longDescription:
Free HTML & CSS for Beginners

HTML and CSS are the backbone of the web. Whether you want to build stunning websites, create engaging user interfaces, or prepare for a career in web development, understanding these core technologies is essential. From structuring content with HTML to styling with CSS, this beginner-friendly course will equip you with the foundational skills you need to start your journey in web development.


What You’ll Learn

  • HTML Basics: Structure web pages with elements, headings, paragraphs, and more

  • CSS Fundamentals: Style your pages with colors, fonts, and layouts

  • Lists & Tables: Organize and display content effectively

  • Forms & Inputs: Collect user input with form elements

  • Links & Media: Work with images, SVGs, and hyperlinks

  • Responsive Design: Use media queries to make websites mobile-friendly


Beginner-Friendly Course Format

  • 2 hours of HD video lessons

  • Short, focused videos for each concept

  • Learn at your own pace with lifetime access


Who is This Course For?

  • Beginners – Perfect for those new to coding

  • Complete Beginners in Web Development – No prior experience required

  • Aspiring Web Designers & Developers – Build a strong foundation in HTML and CSS


Apply Your Knowledge with Real Practice

During the course, we will build a simple website—a personal portfolio/bio page with a contact form - to apply all the concepts learned.


Get Started Today!

No prior coding experience is required. All you need is a computer, an internet connection, and a willingness to learn.
targetAudiences: Beginners – Perfect for those new to coding
Aspiring Web Designers & Developers – Get a quick start on learning HTML & CSS
Complete Beginners in Web Development – No prior experience required

courseDetails.title: Improve Attention Span-Find 5 Differences In Similar Images
courseDetails.shortDescription: Improve attention span and concentration. Especially for people with special needs.
courseDetails.longDescription:
Improve attention span, Concentration and Personality for all ages.

Are you looking for a fun and engaging way to improve your attention span, concentration, and personality? Look no further than our Spot the Difference videos!

Our videos feature captivating images with subtle differences that will challenge your observation skills and keep you entertained. By regularly watching our videos, you can:

- Sharpen your attention to detail: Train your eyes to pick up on even the smallest discrepancies.

- Enhance your concentration: Stay focused and engaged for longer periods.

- Develop your personality: Improve your patience, persistence, and problem-solving abilities.

- Our videos are perfect for people of all ages and can be enjoyed anytime, anywhere. Whether you're looking to boost your brainpower during your commute or unwind after a long day, our Spot the Difference videos are the perfect solution.

For All Kids:

- Cognitive Development: Spot the Difference activities are a fun way to boost visual discrimination skills, attention to detail, and problem-solving abilities. These skills are crucial for learning and development in all areas.

- Entertainment and Engagement: Kids love a good challenge! These videos provide a captivating and entertaining way to pass the time while learning valuable skills.

- Quiet Time Activity: Spot the Difference videos can be a calming activity for kids who need a break from more active play.


Note: Those under 18 may use the services only if a parent or guardian opens their account, handles any enrollments, and manages their account usage. The course is intended for purchase by adults.


For People with Special Needs:

- Attention Deficits (ADHD): Children with ADHD often struggle with focus and attention. Spot the Difference activities can help improve their concentration and visual attention span in a fun and engaging way.

- Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD): Many children with ASD excel at visual learning and enjoy activities that involve patterns and details. Spot the Difference videos can cater to these strengths while helping them develop social skills like patience and turn-taking.

- Learning Disabilities: Spot the Difference activities can be adapted to suit different learning styles and abilities. They can help children with learning disabilities improve their visual perception, memory, and cognitive processing skills.

Watch our Spot the Difference videos and experience the benefits for yourself.


Note: Those under 18 may use the services only if a parent or guardian opens their account, handles any enrollments, and manages their account usage. The course is intended for purchase by adults.
targetAudiences: Any ages for engagement and personal development. Especially for people with special needs.
